_comment: Answers for `databricks bundle init` -> sdp-meta DAB template, scenario C: combined bronze+silver in ONE Lakeflow Declarative Pipeline (pipeline_mode=combined) reading Event Hubs. Showcases the single-DLT topology + the eventhub source format. {uc_catalog_name}, {sdp_meta_schema}, {bronze_target_schema}, and {silver_target_schema} are substituted at runtime (driven by --uc-catalog-name and --uc-schema).
author: dab-template-demo
